description:
Cluster: 0
Directory: lib/output

 responsibility:
- The responsibility of this directory is to provide classes and interfaces for writing output data in various formats.
- It provides a way to control the format of the output data and to handle the committing and aborting of the output.

collaboration:
- The classes in this directory collaborate to provide different output formats, such as text, sequence files, and map files.
- They also collaborate to handle the committing and aborting of the output data.

architectural role or pattern:
- The architectural role of this directory is to provide a way to control the output format and to handle the committing and aborting of the output data.
- It follows the pattern of the factory method pattern, where each output format has a corresponding OutputFormat class that creates a RecordWriter for writing the output data.
